claimText: Project 17A stealth frigates are follow-on ships of the Shivalik-class (Project 17) frigates.
examUse: Statement-based question comparing naval projects and their predecessor classes.

claimText: A total of seven frigates under Project 17A are being indigenously built by Mazagon Dock (Mumbai) and GRSE (Kolkata).
evidenceExcerpt: Seven Frigates being indigenously built by Mazagon Dock (Mumbai) and GRSE (Kolkata).
examUse: Statement-based question on indigenous manufacturing and the specific shipyards involved.

claimText: INS Udaygiri and INS Himgiri are multi-mission stealth frigates commissioned under Project 17A.
evidenceExcerpt: Two multi-mission stealth frigates of Project 17A - INS Udaygiri and INS Himgiri, were commissioned into the Indian Navy.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching naval vessels to their respective projects.

claimText: Project 17A frigates are configured with Combined Diesel or Gas (CODOG) main propulsion plants.
evidenceExcerpt: Configured with Combined Diesel or Gas (CODOG) main propulsion plants.
examUse: Statement-based question on the technical specifications and propulsion systems of Indian naval ships.
